iterations.theme: Breaking the Taboo: Open Dialogue on Sex, Shame, and Intimacy in a Religious Context
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire transcript forms a cohesive discussion on a single overarching theme, making a single iteration appropriate within the specified time range.
